title: Fun House Samui
shortDesc: Large indoor soft play park with slides, climbing walls, ball pits and trampolines — plus a cafe so parents can relax on-site.
description: Fun House Samui is a large indoor soft play centre with slides, climbing walls, ball pits, obstacle courses and a dedicated toddler area. The facility has a minimum of two staff on-site at all times plus CCTV, making it genuinely drop-off friendly. Parents who stay can relax in the on-site cafe and restaurant. Socks required — 50 THB to buy on-site if needed.
